change: Modified HomePage.jsx to include total real estate value in total assets, added a new KPI tile for real estate equity, and updated the 'kpi-row' class to 'seven'.
Corrected syntax error in RealEstateWidget.jsx by unescaping newlines and quotes in the JSX return statement.
Created new CSS file with design system from terravest-redesign.html.
Updated index.html to include Google Fonts and Tabler Icons stylesheets.
Updated main.jsx to import terravest-theme.css and removed old styles.css import.
Created AppLayout.jsx with main application shell, sidebar, topbar, outer tabs, and React Router setup. Placeholder pages are used initially.
Refactored App.jsx to use the new AppLayout component, passing all necessary state and handlers as props. Removed old Shell component usage and individual page imports.
Updated AppLayout.jsx to import actual page components and pass down props received from App.jsx to the respective Route elements. Also updated Sidebar and Topbar to use passed props.

Refactored HomePage.jsx to align with the new design from terravest-redesign.html, including new KPI grid, credit utilization, upcoming bills, recent transactions, and AI insights sections. Dynamic data is mapped from props, and old components like RealEstateWidget were removed.

Refactored PlanPage.jsx to align with the 'BUDGET' and 'DEBT LAB' sections from terravest-redesign.html. This included updating headers, summary cards, tables, and strategy cards with new styles and dynamic data mapping. Mock data is used for budget and debts.

Refactored BillPayPage.jsx to align with the 'BILL PAY' section from terravest-redesign.html. This included updating the page header, stepper, review details, and summary sidebar with new styles and dynamic data mapping.
Created DealRoomPage.jsx based on the 'DEAL ROOM' section of terravest-redesign.html, converting HTML structure and styling into JSX.
Refactored RealEstatePage.jsx to align with the 'Properties' section from terravest-redesign.html, including new KPI grid and property cards. Dynamic data is mapped from the 'properties' prop.
Created StyleGuidePage.jsx based on the 'STYLE GUIDE' section of terravest-redesign.html, converting HTML structure and styling into JSX.
Created UIFlowMapPage.jsx based on the 'UI FLOW MAP' section of terravest-redesign.html, converting HTML structure and styling into JSX.
Updated AppLayout.jsx to import and use StyleGuidePage and UIFlowMapPage in the routing.

Enhanced /v1/me/snapshot to include real estate values and 30-day changes for all KPIs. Modified /v1/ai/insights to return structured mock data. Added new mock APIs: /v1/aggregation/link-broker and /v1/investment-accounts for simulating external service integrations. Updated real estate mock data.
Fixed unterminated string constant error in className attribute.
Added react-router-dom to dependencies.
Created MyBusinessPage.jsx with initial UI structure, mock data for KPIs, chart, loan breakdown, profit/loss summary, and AI insight block, adhering to TerraVest design system.
Integrated MyBusinessPage into AppLayout.jsx's sidebar navigation and routing.
Added mock API endpoint /v1/my-business/dashboard to provide data for the My Business page.
Created AIAssistantPage.jsx with initial UI structure for controls, input fields, and placeholder for AI results and disclaimer, adhering to TerraVest design system.
Integrated AIAssistantPage into AppLayout.jsx's sidebar navigation and routing.
Added mock API endpoint /v1/ai-assistant/suggestions to provide dynamic mock data for AI suggestions based on input parameters.
Created pom.xml for auth-service with Spring Boot, JPA, PostgreSQL, Security, Lombok, and JJWT dependencies.
Created main Spring Boot application class for auth-service.
Created application.properties for auth-service with basic app name, port, JWT config, and Flyway settings.
Created application-dev.properties for auth-service using H2 in-memory database for development.
Created application-prod.properties for auth-service using PostgreSQL with environment variables for production.
Created db/migration directory for Flyway scripts.
Created User JPA entity with id, email, passwordHash, roles, createdAt, updatedAt fields.
Created Role enum for user roles.
Created initial Flyway migration script for users and user_roles tables.
Created UserRepository interface extending JpaRepository.
Created RegisterRequest DTO with email and password fields and validation.
Created LoginRequest DTO with email and password fields and validation.
Created AuthResponse DTO for JWT token and message.
Created JwtService for JWT generation and validation.
Created UserDetailsServiceImpl for Spring Security integration.
Created AuthService to handle user registration, login, and JWT generation.
Allowed bean definition overriding to resolve CorsWebFilter conflict.
